title: VeriDoc AI — Project Initiation Document
summary: Project Initiation Document for VeriDoc AI, an AI-powered Source Data Verification platform for clinical trials, covering scope, functional requirements, architecture, and regulatory strategy.
scope: Regulatory frameworks (21 CFR Part 11, EMA Annex 11, ICH E6(R3), GDPR, HIPAA)
notes: Manifest declared PRD; treated as authoritative. Document is a hybrid Project Initiation Document containing PRD-level scope/requirements (sections 1-2), SPEC-level technical architecture (section 3), and several effectively-locked technical/regulatory decisions (FHIR R4 normalization, Medidata Rave as primary eCRF, mandatory human-in-the-loop, GAMP 5 CSV, regional data-residency). Synthesizer should be aware that ADR-grade locked decisions are embedded here despite the PRD classification.
